name: Brunch Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Pat the pizza dough out on a 13-by-9-inch pan or round pizza pan.
3. Cut the ham into strips and place them on the dough.
4. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the ham.
5. In a bowl, combine the eggs and milk and beat until blended.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the dough and sprinkle with oregano.
7. Bake in the oven for 20 to 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
